_comment: Merge the 'hooks' block below into your .claude/settings.json.
_usage: After any .rego file is written, opa check runs automatically. Syntax errors surface immediately without a manual tool call.
_prereq: opa must be on PATH, or set OPA_BINARY and replace 'opa' in the command below with the absolute path.

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=(d.get('tool_input') or {}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(0) if not fp.endswith('.rego') else None; r=subprocess.run(['opa','check',fp],capture_output=True,text=True); print(r.stderr or r.stdout,end='') if r.returncode else None; sys.exit(r.returncode)"
